config.script:
# Open the condenser pump controls popup.
	
	system.perspective.openPopup('condenser-pump-controls','Building Automation Demo/Page/Controls/Framework/AHU 1/Control Popups/Condenser Pump Controls',position = {'left':event.clientX,'top':event.clientY},resizable=False,title='Condenser Pump')

# Open the condenser fan controls popup.
	
	system.perspective.openPopup('condenser-fan-controls','Building Automation Demo/Page/Controls/Framework/AHU 1/Control Popups/Condenser Fan Controls',position = {'left':event.clientX,'top':event.clientY},resizable=False,title='Condenser Fan')

transforms.code: return "{:.1f}%".format(value)

config.script:
# Open the main compressor controls popup.
	
	system.perspective.openPopup('compressor-controls-main','Building Automation Demo/Page/Controls/Framework/AHU 1/Control Popups/Compressor Controls Main',params={},resizable=False,title='Compressor Controls (AHU1)')

# Open the compressor controls popup for this compressor.
	
	ahu = self.custom.ahu
	compNumb = self.custom.compNumb
	
	viewPath = 'Building Automation Demo/Page/Controls/Framework/AHU {ahu}/Control Popups/Compressor Controls'.format(ahu=ahu)
	title = 'Compressor {compNumb} (AHU{ahu})'.format(compNumb=compNumb,ahu=ahu)
	
	system.perspective.openPopup('compressor-controls',viewPath,params={'compNum':compNumb,'ahu':ahu},position = {'left':event.clientX,'top':event.clientY},resizable=False,title=title)

# Open the compressor controls popup for this compressor.
